creator: tekjau@gmail.com
text:
I'm trying to install FreeBSD/amd64 9.0R on a new Dell PowerEdge R420 server with RAID (Dell PERC H310 Mini), on 2xSAS and 2xSSD hdd, but I failed to do so as the installation will abort during the partition step, after select <GUIDED> or <Manual>, and I have these error messages:

pid 967 (partedit), uid 0: exited on signal 11
pid 998 (autopart), uid 0: exited on signal 11


I have tried to disable the RAID and remove all hdds from RAID connection, but still get the same result.

Fix: 

Someone on the forum says that 9.1RC has the driver (mps driver? I'm not sure what's this) and able to install on new Dell server. I will try to download 9.1RC and reinstall again.
How-To-Repeat: Install
